notes:
- Another go at the update-time "Failed to load Python DLL" popup: the post-update relaunch now waits 3 seconds (relaunching the instant the new exe was written raced antivirus scanning), and boots are now logged so if it ever shows again we can pinpoint it for good. The popup was always harmless - the app updates and runs fine; just click OK if you see it one more time on this update.

App-only update: no "Update Bridge Payload" step.
